== Notes for [[Item:Q3063|Q3063]] ==

This profile states the birth of Geronimo to be in Spain at the time his father, Conquistador Franciso Coronado was doing his famous exploration of modern day New Mexico during 1540-42. Is it possible he was born in modern day Mexico City instead?

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADAFD7571EFBBFA9822EF79916C068A
geni:6000000001500803697


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
